name: Chinese Almond Chicken (Gbgh75a)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Onion - cut in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and skin chicken, or use deboned and skinned chicken breasts from a 4 oz can.
2. Remove both light and dark meat from bones and cut into shreds.
3. Mix shredded chicken with soy sauce, salt, cornstarch, and Sherry; set aside.
4. Fry almonds or walnuts in hot oil until golden brown. Drain on paper towel.
5. Reheat pan with 1 1/2 cups oil. Saute vegetables for 1 minute. Drain off oil and set aside.
6. Heat 4 tablespoons oil. Saute chicken for 1 minute.
7. Mix vegetables, stock, and almonds or walnuts in the pan. Simmer for 1 minute.
8. Serve with rice. Serves 4 to 6 people.
